prompt:
Final barrier audit for the smoke-scoped Sudoku Foundry adversarial replay.

Audit these PromptEnvelope artifacts and report whether the barrier is clean:
- runs/pi-autonomous-sudoku-smoke/dispatch/phase1/red-team.json
- runs/pi-autonomous-sudoku-smoke/dispatch/phase2/green-team.json

Expected barrier:
- Red received full NLSpec/spec and no implementation code.
- Green received NLSpec How plus PASS/FAIL outcome labels only; no test code, no raw test output, and no acceptance-criteria section.

Also note that tests were replayed in the temporary workspace under /tmp and passed 30/30.

visible_context.label: expected_barrier
visible_context.content: red sees spec/NLSpec but no implementation; green sees How plus PASS/FAIL labels only
